message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

class initConnect4View <<C>> {
  play()
}

class initGameView <<C>> {
  play()
  showBoard()
  showFinalMsg()
}

class initYesNoDialogView <<C>> {
  read()
  isAffirmative()
  isNegative()
}

class initGame <<C>> {
  MAX_MOVEMENTS
  --
  updateGrid()
  isEndGame()
  isWinner()
  isTied()
}

class initCoordinate <<C>> {
  row
  col
  owner
}

class initBoardView <<C>> {
  board
  --
  showBoard()
  readColumn()
}

class initPlayer <<C>> {
  turn
  player1
  player2
  --
  getTurn()
  changeTurn()
}

class initBoard <<C>> {
  MIN_ROWS
  MIN_COLUMNS
  MAX_ROWS
  MAX_COLUMNS
  NUMBER_CONNECTIONS
  grid
  --
  isConnectedInVertical()
  isConnectedInHorizontal()
  isConnectedInDiagonal()
}

initConnect4View --> initGameView
initConnect4View ..> initYesNoDialogView

initGameView --> initGame

initGame --> initCoordinate
initGame --> initBoardView
initGame --> initPlayer

initBoardView --> initBoard
@enduml
